pi_items.source: Hardcoded in export_result.sh and checked in verifier.py as the target file path.
Hardcoded in setup_task.sh where the source data is downloaded and saved.
Verified via the download URL in setup_task.sh: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opengeos/data/main/raster/landsat.tif
Verified in export_result.sh and verifier.py which explicitly check for the 'PNG' image format.
Verified in verifier.py which enforces both image width and height to be >= 400 for a full score.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real Landsat multispectral imagery downloaded from the opengeos GitHub repository (saved to /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif). The correct output must be a valid PNG image saved at /home/ga/snap_exports/landsat_figure.png with minimum dimensions of 400x400 pixels. The verifier uses a VLM to confirm the image is a cleanly exported false-color cartographic figure containing both a scale bar and a north arrow.
